name: Spicy Tofu-Bell Pepper Supreme
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Bell peppers, mixed green and red, diced
1 1/2 cups Garbanzo beans, canned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the olive oil or vegetable stock, bell peppers, and onions in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium-high heat for 5 to 8 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
3. Reduce the heat to medium and add the remaining ingredients: salsa, olives, garbanzo beans, tofu, salt, and pepper.
4. Stir to combine all ingredients.
5. Continue cooking over medium heat for an additional 10 minutes, or until the tofu is heated through and everything is well combined.
6. Serve with Fresh Corn Salad or brown rice.
Vegetarian Cooking for Good Health by Gary Null/MM by Deanne
